## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is rebased on latest `main`
- [ ] No `console.log` / debugger leftovers
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/01-PRD-and-Plan.md` decision log if behavior-changing)
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the package's README
